content: getUserMedia (MDN, Baseline Widely available since Sept 2017) — secure context REQUIRED (HTTPS or localhost); navigator.mediaDevices undefined otherwise (TypeError if called). Returns Promise<MediaStream>; rejects with NotAllowedError (user denies/insecure context), NotFoundError (no matching device), OverconstrainedError, NotReadableError (hw failure). Constraints: {video:{facingMode:{exact:'environment'}}, audio:false}; 'exact' = mandatory, plain/ideal = soft preference. For phone AR/rear camera use facingMode:'environment' (or {exact:'environment'} to force rear camera). Assign stream to video.srcObject, call play() onloadedmetadata. Switching facingMode requires stopping existing tracks first. Privacy: persistent top-level origin permission, browser shows recording indicator; iOS Safari requires user-gesture-initiated call. For camera-as-canvas: request video only, audio:false (no mic needed for TV viewing). Permissions Policy header camera=(self) for iframe use.
